---
name: New game idea
about: Suggest a game (or offer to build one)
title: "[idea] <game name or mechanic>"
labels: idea
---

**The one mechanic**
What's the single verb the player repeats? (steer, flip, time a tap, …)

**The hook**
What makes "one more try" irresistible — and what's the score you're beating?

**The twist (optional)**
What turns your own success into your next danger?

**Are you up for building it?**
- [ ] I'd like to build it (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Just an idea — someone else is welcome to take it
